The '''Jade Moon''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Loronar/Legends|Loronar]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].

[[File:Rogue_Squadron_Jade_Moon_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] above the Jade Moon, with Loronar in background.]]
It was a major construction facility for [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] as well as a supply hub. [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] were built on the moon for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Kasan Moor]] led the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] flight group [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to [[Battle of the Jade Moon|attack]] the facility, where [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] led an aerial assault, concentrating their attacks on the well-defended power generator in addition to providing air-support, while [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] led a squad of ground troops against the facility itself.<ref name="RS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Jade Moon appears during the campaign of the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']].<ref name="RS" />
